response.justification: The candidate demonstrates well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience with strong, directly relevant work: TypeScript/Node.js/React with MongoDB and AWS in production at scale, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and a deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, trunk-based development). Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin exposure, and the named testing tools (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) and auth/security practices are implied rather than demonstrated, but the breadth and depth of demonstrated engineering work strongly fits the role.
strengths: Extensive production full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK
Current AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source test tooling authorship, and teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Jest/Vitest/Playwright not explicitly named despite broad testing background
Authentication/authorization and security best practices not directly demonstrated in the resume

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling development
Missing Nest.js/Kotlin and explicit security experience
